## What changed

Describe the pet, tooling, documentation, or validation change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Animation and direction contact sheets reviewed when pet pixels changed
- [ ] English and Simplified Chinese documentation/UI kept in sync

## Asset rights
